artifacts.description: Per-timestep hidden-state vectors from a small TRAINED GRU language model (train-rnn), plus a token-0 influence-decay trace. Replayed on a heatmap; the browser never runs the RNN.
Char / word / BPE lookup tables (vocab + ordered merges) for the Tokenizer station. Segmentation runs in the browser; this only supplies ids.

Recorded REAL Qwen3-0.6B forward-pass pipeline for the preset sentences: [layer][head][query][key] attention, fixed-stride embedding/MLP slices, and the top-N next-token distribution. Replayed in-browser; no model runs there.
